_comment: n8n Workflow Configuration — Placeholder webhook URLs. Replace with actual n8n instance URLs when ready.

new_lead_notification.name: New Lead Notification
new_lead_notification.description: Sends email/WhatsApp notification when a new lead is created

lead_stage_update.name: Lead Stage Update
lead_stage_update.description: Triggers follow-up actions when lead stage changes

proposal_generator.name: Generate Proposal PDF
proposal_generator.description: Generates and emails a solar proposal PDF to the lead

payment_reminder.name: Payment Reminder
payment_reminder.description: Sends payment reminder via email and WhatsApp

inventory_restock_alert.name: Inventory Restock Alert
inventory_restock_alert.description: Alerts operations team when stock falls below reorder level

project_milestone_update.name: Project Milestone Update
project_milestone_update.description: Notifies stakeholders when a project milestone is completed

daily_summary_email.name: Daily Summary Email
daily_summary_email.description: Sends daily business summary email to the owner

indiamart_lead_import.name: IndiaMART Lead Import
indiamart_lead_import.description: Receives lead data from IndiaMART and creates a new lead
